svg.title: MIEI HOME sketchnote — one founder building a privacy-first AI home ecosystem
svg.desc: A hand-drawn style sketchnote showing the MIEI HOME and Kuman ecosystem: the hub at the center, Kuman nodes in rooms, B2B and home markets, the founder working with AI, and the product roadmap from hardware to proactive AI.
svg.text: My-AI Home — the big picture • Apr 2026
KUMAN — proactive AI, not reactive assistant
"Good morning — your milk is almost gone. Want me to add it to the list?"
"Someone rang the gate at 6pm. Not your usual postman. Want to see the clip?"
"The jug fell at 14:23. It was Mochi — she jumped from the fridge."
"Your keys were on the dining table this morning at 7:42."
1 person. 16 hours. Several AIs. One mission. — We don't just talk, we build.
